summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of GenStudio feature suite completed. All 7 GenStudio pages load correctly, forms work as expected, and navigation between pages functions properly. No 'Coming Soon' badges found - all 5 tools are available.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GenStudio feature suite fully tested. All pages load correctly: Dashboard, Text-to-Image, Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, Video Remix, Style Profiles, and History. Forms work correctly with proper validation (consent checkbox required, file upload required for Image-to-Video and Video Remix). Navigation between pages works. Backend APIs all return 200 status codes.

genstudio_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with all 5 tools visible (Text→Image, Text→Video, Image→Video, Brand Style Profiles, Video Remix). No 'Coming Soon' badges. Stats cards, Quick Templates, and Recent Generations sections all render correctly.

text_to_image.details: Page loads with Quick Templates, Prompt textarea, Negative Prompt textarea, Aspect Ratio dropdown (1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3), Add Watermark toggle, Content Rights Confirmation checkbox, and Generate Image button (10 credits). Button enables after consent is checked.

text_to_video.details: Page loads with Video Prompt textarea, Aspect Ratio dropdown (16:9, 9:16, 1:1), Duration dropdown (4s, 8s, 12s), Add Watermark toggle, Content Rights Confirmation checkbox, and Generate Video button (10 credits). Sora 2 reference visible in subtitle.

image_to_video.details: Page loads with Upload Image area (PNG, JPEG, WebP max 10MB), Motion Description textarea, Duration dropdown, Add Watermark toggle, Content Rights Confirmation checkbox, and Animate Image button (10 credits). Button correctly disabled until image is uploaded.

video_remix.details: Page loads with Upload Video area (MP4, WebM, MOV max 50MB), Remix Instructions textarea, Template Style dropdown (Dynamic, Smooth, Dramatic), Add Watermark toggle, Content Rights Confirmation checkbox, and Remix Video button (12 credits). Button correctly disabled until video is uploaded.

style_profiles.details: Page loads with info section explaining Style Profiles, cost info (20 credits to create, 1 credit per use), Create Profile button. Modal opens with Profile Name input, Description textarea, Tags input with + button, 20 credits cost notice, and Create Profile button.

history.details: Page loads with Filter dropdown (All Types, Text→Image, Text→Video, Image→Video, Video Remix), Refresh button, 15-minute expiry notice, and empty state with 'Create Your First Image' button.

navigation.details: Back button navigation works correctly from all GenStudio pages to Dashboard. Tool card clicks navigate to correct pages. History link in header works.

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All GenStudio endpoints are implemented. Actual AI generation (Gemini for images, Sora 2 for videos) was NOT tested as per instructions to avoid credit consumption.
